title: Clotted Specimen
content: A clot in an anticoagulated tube (EDTA, citrate, heparin) invalidates cell counts and coagulation results, and risks instrument clogging. Disposition: retest_required in all cases — a clotted specimen cannot be salvaged by re-mixing or re-centrifuging. Reject the specimen immediately and notify the collection site that proper tube inversion technique (8-10 gentle inversions immediately after draw) is required on recollection.
